tool_input.command:
cd ~/Dev/OpenSourceMartelloSystems
MSG="Remove em dashes across code and docs (house style)

Replace every em/en dash with context-appropriate punctuation (colon,
period, comma, or parentheses) across READMEs, CLI help, error and console
output, code comments, and test fixtures. No logic changed; test suites green.
Also replace the README demo-GIF placeholder with the real check output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>"

for r in envz launchpad agent-firewall spec-verify snapdb; do
  cd ~/Dev/OpenSourceMartelloSystems/$r
  git add -A
  git commit -q -m "$MSG" && echo "$r: committed" || echo "$r: nothing to commit"
done
echo "=== push ==="
for r in envz launchpad agent-firewall spec-verify snapdb; do
  cd ~/Dev/OpenSourceMartelloSystems/$r
  git push -q origin "$(git branch --show-current)" && echo "$r: pushed ✓" || echo "$r: PUSH FAILED"
done
tool_input.description: Commit and push em-dash purge across all 5 repos
